proof: function[T0: lib(add_comm_group).AddCommGroup, T1: lib(add_comm_group).AddCommGroup](x0: T0 -> T1) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0(x1 + x2) = x0(x1) + x0(x2) } = preserves_add[T0, T1](x0) }[Real, Complex](Complex.from_real)
let w0: Real satisfy { exists(k0: Real) { Complex.from_real(w0 + k0) != Complex.from_real(w0) + Complex.from_real(k0) } }
let w1: Real satisfy { Complex.from_real(w0 + w1) != Complex.from_real(w0) + Complex.from_real(w1) }
let w2: Real satisfy { Complex.from_real(w0 + w2) != Complex.from_real(w0) + Complex.from_real(w2) }
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { Complex.from_real(x0) + Complex.from_real(x1) = Complex.from_real(x0 + x1) }(w0, w2)
function(x0: Real) { Complex.new(x0, Real.0) = Complex.from_real(x0) }(r * x)
function(x0: Real) { Complex.new(x0, Real.0) = Complex.from_real(x0) }(x)
function(x0: Real) { Complex.new(x0, Real.0) = Complex.from_real(x0) }(x)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { Complex.new(x0, x1).re = x0 }(x, Real.0)
function(x0: Real) { Complex.new(x0, Real.0) = Complex.from_real(x0) }(x)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { Complex.new(x0, x1).im = x1 }(x, Real.0)

goal: complex_real_smul(r, Complex.from_real(x)) = Complex.new(r * Complex.from_real(x).re, r * Complex.from_real(x).im)
proof: function(x0: Real, x1: Complex) { Complex.new(x0 * x1.re, x0 * x1.im) = complex_real_smul(x0, x1) }(r, Complex.from_real(x))

goal: complex_real_smul(r, Complex.from_real(x)) = Complex.new(r * x, r * Real.0)

proof: function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { x0 * x1 = x1 * x0 }(Real.0, r)
function(x0: Real) { Real.0 * x0 = Real.0 }(r)

goal: preserves_smul[Real, Real, Complex](ring_as_module[Real], complex_real_module, Complex.from_real) = forall(x0: Real, x1: Real) { Complex.from_real(ring_as_module[Real].smul(x0, x1)) = complex_real_module.smul(x0, Complex.from_real(x1)) }
proof: function[T0: lib(ring).Ring, T1: lib(add_comm_group).AddCommGroup, T2: lib(add_comm_group).AddCommGroup](x0: T1 -> T2, x1: Module[T0, T1], x2: Module[T0, T2]) { forall(x3: T0, x4: T1) { x0(x1.smul(x3, x4)) = x2.smul(x3, x0(x4)) } = preserves_smul[T0, T1, T2](x1, x2, x0) }[Real, Real, Complex](Complex.from_real, ring_as_module[Real], complex_real_module)
let w0: Real satisfy { exists(k0: Real) { Complex.from_real(ring_as_module[Real].smul(w0, k0)) != complex_real_module.smul(w0, Complex.from_real(k0)) } }
let w1: Real satisfy { Complex.from_real(ring_as_module[Real].smul(w0, w1)) != complex_real_module.smul(w0, Complex.from_real(w1)) }
let w2: Real satisfy { Complex.from_real(ring_as_module[Real].smul(w0, w2)) != complex_real_module.smul(w0, Complex.from_real(w2)) }
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { Complex.from_real(ring_as_module[Real].smul(x0, x1)) = complex_real_module.smul(x0, Complex.from_real(x1)) }(w0, w2)

function[T0: lib(add_comm_group).AddCommGroup, T1: lib(add_comm_group).AddCommGroup, T3: lib(ring).Ring](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: Module[T3, T0], x2: Module[T3, T1]) { (preserves_add[T0, T1](x0) and preserves_smul[T3, T0, T1](x1, x2, x0)) = is_linear_map[T3, T0, T1](x1, x2, x0) }[Real, Complex, Real](Complex.from_real, ring_as_module[Real], complex_real_module)
